summary: Verified Live Screen light mode conversion. All features working: white/light backgrounds, header logo from branding, dark readable text, amber/orange/red timer colors visible, white leaderboard cards with borders, sponsor banner displays correctly.

Live Screen auth page title text is dark gray-900 (rgb(17, 24, 39))
Live Screen auth page input fields have light gray background (bg-gray-50)
Live Screen main page has light gray background (bg-gray-50 = rgb(249, 250, 251))
Live Screen shows header_logo from branding next to event name (SGCCI BUSINESS CONNECT logo visible)
Event name text is dark and readable (rgb(17, 24, 39))
Speaker timer displays in amber color (rgb(217, 119, 6)) - visible on light background
7 white background cards found for stats and leaderboards
Leaderboard cards have white bg with proper borders
Sponsor names SGCCI and SBC display with dark text (rgb(17, 24, 39))
Sponsor logos (red and blue) visible on light background
ROUND indicator visible in top right
LIVE badge with green styling visible
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Screen light mode fully implemented and verified. Auth page: bg-white. Main screen: bg-gray-50. Header logo fetched from /api/public/branding header_logo field and displayed next to event name. Timer colors (amber for speaking, orange for concluding, red for done) all visible on light background. Leaderboard cards use bg-white with shadow-sm. Sponsor banner at bottom displays correctly with white background.
